meta.title: timproshka — Web Developer & AI Automation Engineer
meta.description: I build websites that convert and AI systems that save time. Web development, chatbots, and automation. Available for freelance projects.

hero.subtitle: Fast Astro sites + AI automation for B2B service firms
hero.description: I ship production sites in 10 days and automations that save 15+ hours a week.

about.label: About
about.name: Timofey
about.p1: Hey! I'm a 19 y/o web developer and AI automation engineer based in Perm, Russia. I craft fast, beautiful websites and build chatbots & automation pipelines that handle the boring stuff so you don't have to.
about.p2: I work with modern tech — from Astro and React on the frontend to n8n and Python for AI-powered automation. Every project I deliver is built for speed, conversion, and real business results.

items.title: Web Development
items.result: First leads within a week of launch
items.desc: Fast, responsive websites built with modern frameworks. Your site will load in under 2 seconds, look great on any device, and rank well in search engines.

items.title: AI Chatbots
items.result: Handles clients 24/7 — even nights and weekends
items.desc: Telegram or website bots that book appointments, answer questions, and collect leads automatically. No need to hire another support person.

items.title: Automation
items.result: Save 15+ hours per week on repetitive tasks
items.desc: Automated lead processing, report generation, email sequences, and notifications. What you do manually every day — runs on autopilot.

items.title: Nuzhnyi Adres
items.desc: Real estate agency website with smooth animations. Loads in 1.2s, fully responsive.

items.title: Onica
items.desc: Corporate website for an accounting firm. Lead capture forms, service pages, SEO optimization.
items.result: Leads from the site within the first week

items.title: AS-Luch Driving School
items.desc: Website for driving school with 4 branches in Perm. Online booking, class schedule, local SEO.
items.result: Ranks in top for local search

items.title: Report Automation
items.desc: Automated data collection from multiple sources with weekly report delivery to management.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We discuss your goals, analyze competitors, and define what success looks like for your project.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: I create the visual concept and layout. You approve the design before any code is written.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Clean code, real content, daily progress updates. You see the site come to life step by step.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Testing, deployment, analytics setup, and post-launch support. Your site is live and working.

contact.label: Contact
contact.intro: Have a project in mind? Drop me a message — I usually reply within a few hours.
contact.replyTime: I usually reply within a few hours.
